payload.answer: Atomic memory-card requirements and architectural notes were extracted as discrete design_requirement cards.

entity_resolution.reason: No external entity identifiers were provided in the input; only generic components are referenced.

payload.intent: Extract atomic, durable memory cards from the provided context about AI memory systems and memory-card design requirements.

memory_cards.statement: AI memory systems need durable source evidence for context.
Atomic memory cards should be small.
Atomic memory cards should be traceable to their source evidence.
A semantic index can improve recall.
The application database must own the lifecycle of the memory system.
The application database must own conflict state.

details: Extracted 6 atomic cards corresponding to durable evidence, card size/traceability, semantic index recall benefit, and database ownership of lifecycle/conflicts.

repair_options: If available, add citations/links or quote source sections that justify each requirement.
If the system name or product context exists, replace generic terms (e.g., 'application database') with concrete entity names from upstream documentation.
